channel.title: GitLab on d3adb5's personal website
channel.description: Recent content in GitLab on d3adb5's personal website

item.title: Thoughts on GitLab CI
item.description: In 2013, the landing page for GitLab.com described GitLab as Open Source Git Management Software. GitLab CI already existed — it was first created in 2012 — but it was only years later that GitLab started to market itself as a “DevOps platform”, pushing products that span the entirety of the software development lifecycle, from planning to deployment. So how good is their pipeline offering? GitLab CI is GitLab’s built-in pipeline system.
